title: Goodnight, Fifi!
description: Join Fifi the Fox on a cozy bedtime adventure. Follow her routine from pajamas to sweet dreams.

pages.text: Fifi snuggles into soft, star‑spangled pajamas, feeling warm and cozy like a blanket.
She brushes tiny teeth with fruity toothpaste, making sparkly smiles before bedtime.
Mom reads a gentle story about sleepy clouds, and Fifi listens with wide eyes.
A warm hug from Mom feels like sunshine, sealing safe dreams tonight.
The den glows softly with a nightlight, giving comforting twilight until morning.
Fifi drifts off, dreaming sweet dreams of fluffy clouds and twinkling stars.
